channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
It's You.
item.description: To start off, I appreciate the community support I have received on the post about being behind. I am behind, and I can't prove it but does it matter? Achievement that feels shallow on paper...

item.title: 🚀 I Built a Dropshipping Automation Pipeline — Here's What I Learned (and What I'd Do Differently)
item.description: So, a few months ago I got curious about dropshipping — not as a "get rich quick" scheme, but as a real engineering problem. Inventory syncing, pricing algorithms, order routing, supplier APIs......

item.title: How I Cut My LLM API Bill by 40x: A Freelancer's Migration Story
item.description: How I Cut My LLM API Bill by 40x: A Freelancer's Migration Story Last month I almost choked on my coffee when my OpenAI dashboard showed $487.32 for a single client project. That's not profit....

item.title: I shipped an unauthenticated RCE in my own port scanner — here's the whole chain, and how I killed it
item.description: I built a web front end for an Nmap-based port scanner: a FastAPI backend, a React dashboard, background scan jobs, a plugin system, the works. It ran fine. Then I sat down and actually audited it...

item.title: How I Organized Over 180,000 SVG Files into Searchable Collections
item.description: Developers love building things. Sometimes the hardest part isn't writing code—it's organizing data. Over the past few months, I've been building a large SVG library containing more than 180,000...

item.title: 10 Common Unity Networking Issues (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Multiplayer bugs in Unity rarely look like networking bugs. They look like "the game froze," "the player teleported," or "it worked in the Editor and broke in the WebGL build." By the time you've...

item.title: The 555 Timer: The Most Popular Chip Ever Made
item.description: Ask a room full of engineers to name the most popular integrated circuit ever made and you will hear guesses about famous microprocessors or memory chips. The real answer is far humbler: an...

item.title: Beyond the Playbook: Architecting Defenses Against Autonomous AI Threats

item.title: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
item.description: If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s...

item.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
item.description: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

item.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
item.description: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

item.title: America’s greatest idea is still under threat
item.description: The United States of America recently turned 250 years old. What a spectacle! The fireworks were amazing, and millions of proud people celebrated across the nation - even around the world. France...

item.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
item.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

item.title: Iran-Linked Hackers Use New Cavern C2 Framework to Target Israeli Organizations
item.description: An Iranian hacking group affiliated with Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) has been wielding a previously undocumented modular command-and-control (C2) framework dubbed Cavern...

item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s oft-discussed promise that...

item.title: 16-Year-Old Linux KVM Flaw Lets Guest VMs Escape to Host on Intel and AMD x86 Systems
item.description: A use-after-free bug in Linux's KVM hypervisor can be triggered from a guest virtual machine to corrupt the shadow-page state of the host kernel that runs it. Dubbed 'Januscape' and tracked as...

item.title: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who’s armed with a mic and a bowtie
item.description: Bullshit is cheap but truth is expensive. Anyone with half a brain cell can post wild misinformation that goes mega viral, which wastes the time and expertise of highly trained people who feel an...

item.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
item.description: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video...

item.title: Threat Actors Probe Gitea Docker Flaw CVE-2026-20896 13 Days After Disclosure
item.description: Threat actors have been observed attempting to exploit a recently patched critical security flaw in Gitea Docker images, according to Sysdig. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-20896 (CVSS...

item.title: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
item.description: Microsoft is spinning off four of its Xbox game studios - Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, Ninja Theory, and Undead Labs - as part of the restructuring announced today. However, two that...

item.title: I spy
item.description: I've long argued that Hollywood has simultaneously set and ruined our expectations for smart glasses. But after binge-watching two seasons of Netflix's A Man on the Inside, this is perhaps the...

item.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
item.description: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial...

item.title: PRX Part 4: Our Data Strategy
Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
item.description: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

item.title: The DJI Osmo Pocket 3 lookalike is down to $329

item.title: Nintendo will stop selling the original Switch in Europe next year
item.description: Nintendo is making a new version of the Switch 2 with a replaceable battery in Europe - but its predecessor has a very different future. As part of an updated FAQ about revisions to Nintendo...
